ai_summary: Shavonda McClennon is a dedicated early childhood educator with over 20 years of experience, currently pursuing her bachelor's degree in education. She excels at conflict resolution by getting on children's eye level and facilitating problem-solving, making her an excellent fit for a full-time teaching position.
